results.title: Uorfi Javed DEBUNKS cosmetic surgery rumours, blames ‘Stress, cortisol and cat allergy’
results.description: Uorfi Javed shuts down filler rumours, says viral swollen face was due to severe allergy and stress. The actress reveals she's allergic to cats despite owning three. Read further to know the full story.

results.title: Rekha Gupta-led Delhi govt signs key MoA to support dust-free roads
results.description: The initiative is expected to strengthen pollution control and contribute to a cleaner, greener, and more sustainable Delhi. Cabinet ministers Parvesh Sahib Singh and Manjinder Singh Sirsa were present on the occasion.

results.description: New Delhi Fire: Owner's custody extended; 22 killed in hotel blaze. Court remands another accused in deadly fire investigation.
